name: Kevin Xu Photography
location: Detroit and wherever the light lands next
tagline: Portraits, travel, and sports photography presented through three focused category pages and an interactive travel map.
heroTitle: Portraits, motion, and far-flung places with room to breathe.
heroBody: This portfolio is built to let people slow down with the work. The site is organized around people, travel, and sports, with travel also viewable through a map.
introShort: I am Kevin Xu, a photographer focused on people, travel, and sports, with an eye for atmosphere as much as action.
I like images that feel lived in, whether they come from a portrait session at golden hour, a long road through another country, or a split second on the sideline.

heroStats.label: Core disciplines
heroStats.note: People, travel, and sports in one file-backed portfolio.

heroStats.label: Globe-ready sets
heroStats.note: Travel collections with coordinates show up on the interactive map.

heroStats.label: Editing model
heroStats.note: No public admin surface; updates happen directly in the repo.

categories.description: Portrait work that leans into atmosphere, gesture, and the space around a person.
Location-based sets that visitors can explore through a dedicated travel page and map view.
Fast, high-energy frames focused on impact, anticipation, and the edge of action.
